sarva-rules-v0.label: Sarva Hybrid (rules + reasoning)
sarva-rules-v0.description: Hybrid keyword rules + confidence reasoning + capability bounds. Active until trained LoRA is served + promoted.

sarva-v2.label: Sarva Conductor v2 (Qwen2.5-14B QLoRA)
sarva-v2.description: TRAINED + pushed to HF (2026-07-09, RunPod A40, 3 epochs on sarva_master_train). Live-tested: correct confidence-gated routing. To activate: serve deploy/runpod/serve_sarva.py, set SARVA_INFERENCE_URL, then scripts/plug_sarva_after_train.py --promote --approve. NOTE: base is Qwen2.5-14B (paper's Nemotron-30B is nemotron_h hybrid, not Unsloth-trainable).
